case_title: ROSA ISELA ACEVES DE LA CRUZ VS. CARLOS VASQUEZ-BENITEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACEVES DE LA CRUZ, ROSA ISELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ-BENITEZ, CARLOS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROSELA ISELA ACEVEDES DE AL CRUZ, ASSISTED BY MONICA FERNANDEZ, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS VASQUEZ-BENITEZ IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
